stories.headline: SEC's Atkins unveils tokenization sandbox as Lummis vows CLARITY Act push
stories.tldr: U.S. regulators flashed a unified pro-crypto signal at Bitcoin 2026, with the SEC, CFTC and White House aligning on a tokenization framework.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A coordinated SEC-CFTC posture removes the agency-shopping ambiguity that has kept institutional desks on the sidelines for years.
the_details: SEC Chair Paul Atkins said an innovation exemption letting firms test on-chain tokenization will launch in coming weeks.
White House digital-assets head Patrick Witt teased an imminent Strategic Bitcoin Reserve announcement at the conference.
Senator Cynthia Lummis vowed to push the CLARITY Act into review, targeting a final U.S. crypto market-structure law.

stories.headline: April crypto hacks hit $606M in 18 days, worst run since Bybit breach
stories.tldr: Crypto protocols lost $606M to 47 hacks in just 18 days of April, the worst stretch since Bybit's $1.5B breach in February 2025.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Bridge-design and key-management assumptions baked into 2025 valuations are no longer defensible — TVL is repricing security risk in real time.
the_details: Lazarus-linked Drift Protocol drain on April 1 took $285M after social engineers compromised an admin key.
Kelp DAO bridge exploit on April 19 siphoned ~116,500 rsETH worth roughly $293M via LayerZero.
Attack frequency is up 68% YoY with 47 separate DeFi incidents recorded in the first four-and-a-half months of 2026.

stories.headline: Michigan consumer sentiment craters to record 49.8 as inflation expectations spike
stories.tldr: U.S. consumer sentiment fell to an all-time low of 49.8 in April with one-year inflation expectations jumping to 4.8% from 3.8% the prior month.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Stagflation prints kill the soft-landing bid for risk assets and complicate the Fed's rate path right as Powell hands the gavel to Warsh.
the_details: University of Michigan consumer sentiment index hit 49.8 in April, the lowest reading on record.
One-year inflation expectations surged to 4.8% from 3.8%, driven largely by Iran-conflict supply shocks.
Long-term five-to-ten-year inflation expectations rose to 3.5%, the highest reading since October 2025.

stories.headline: ETH ETFs bleed $75.9M as BTC, SOL and XRP funds pull fresh inflows
stories.tldr: Spot Ethereum ETFs posted $75.9M in net outflows while Bitcoin, Solana and XRP funds attracted inflows, exposing a clean rotation out of ETH.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Allocators are pricing the newly SEC-blessed XRP and SOL products as cleaner directional bets, putting fee and narrative pressure on ETH issuers.
the_details: Ethereum spot ETFs logged $75.9M in net outflows in the latest session.
Bitcoin, Solana and XRP ETFs all posted positive net inflows on the same day.
U.S. spot XRP ETFs now hold $1.53B in AUM with 773M XRP in custody after their March launch.

stories.headline: TOKEN2049 Dubai pushed to 2027 as UAE security risks rattle organizers
stories.tldr: TOKEN2049 organizers postponed the Dubai 2026 edition to 2027, citing heightened security risks across the UAE amid regional geopolitical tension.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Crypto's marquee Middle East summit slipping a year is a tangible read on geopolitical premium — sponsors and family offices are already redirecting Q4 calendars.
the_details: Organizers cited heightened security risks in the UAE as the reason for the year-long delay.
TOKEN2049 Dubai is one of the largest crypto industry conferences globally for Middle East deal flow.
The postponement pushes the next Dubai edition out to 2027, per The Block.
